title: IESO LMP Real Time 5 Min Ontario Zonal JSON API
description:
Five-minute, real-time, LMP values for the Ontario-wide zonal price in IESO. This Ontario Zonal Price (OZNP) is a load-weighted LMP across the entire province, that passive loads settle against. 

This price is similar to the old Hourly Ontario Energy Price (HOEP), and was part of a compromise in the design of the Market Renewal Program, which originally planned on using aggregate zonal prices for passive load settlement.
